blended.narrative: Lookout Pass is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,292 ft. Looking ahead, 31 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Tomorrow: 5" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Thursday: 7" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 30".
